supportedCapabilities.summary: Send a GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, or PATCH request to the resolved URL and save the Response object in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: выполнен (GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH) запрос на URL "(.*)". Полученный ответ сохранен в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The address is resolved through PropertyLoader before the request is sent.
This contract covers the generic HTTP method dispatch only; it does not claim endpoint-specific request or response semantics.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Send a GET(SSE) request, capture the first returned line, wrap it in braces, and save that string in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: выполнен GET\(SSE\) запрос на URL "(.*)". Полученный ответ сохранен в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The implementation reads only the first line from the SSE response stream and stores a brace-wrapped string.
This bundle does not promise multi-event accumulation, reconnect logic, or structured SSE event parsing.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Send a GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, or PATCH request with table-driven request parameters and save the Response object in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: выполнен (GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH) запрос на URL "(.*)" с headers и parameters из таблицы. Полученный ответ сохранен в переменную "(.*)"
notes: Reviewed table row types are transformed by ApiHooks.requestParamTransformer and executed through ApiBaseMethods.createRequest.

The reviewed RequestParamType surface includes PARAMETER, HEADER, BODY, BODY_BYTE, COOKIE, API_SPEC, NO_SSL_CHECK, SSL_CERTIFICATE_FILE, SSL_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD, SSL_CERTIFICATE_TYPE, VAR, MULTIPART, MULTIPART_FILE, MULTIPART_FILE_CONTENT, MULTIPART_UTF8, and FORM_PARAM.
The VAR row type mutates Akita scenario state while building the request instead of sending wire data.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Send a request without table parameters and assert that the response status code matches the expected value.
stepPatterns: выполнен (GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH) запрос на URL "(.*)". Ожидается код ответа: (\d+)

supportedCapabilities.summary: Send a table-driven request and assert that the response status code matches the expected value.
stepPatterns: выполнен (GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH) запрос на URL "(.*)" с headers и parameters из таблицы. Ожидается код ответа: (\d+)

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that a previously stored Response object has the expected status code.
stepPatterns: в ответе "(.*)" код ответа равен (\d+)

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read a named cookie from a stored Response object and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из ответа "(.*)" cookie с именем "(.*)" сохранен в переменную "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read a named header from a stored Response object and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из ответа "(.*)" header с именем "(.*)" сохранен в переменную "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read a value from a stored response body by JsonPath and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из ответа "(.*)" значение тела по пути "(.*)" сохранено в переменную "(.*)"
notes: Paths starting with '$' are resolved with Jayway JsonPath; other paths are resolved with RestAssured JsonPath.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Save the full response body string from a stored Response object into a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из ответа "(.*)" значение тела сохранено в переменную "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that each JsonPath from a Cucumber table resolves inside a reviewed JSON string or file input.
stepPatterns: в json (?:строке|файле) "(.*)" элементы, найденные по jsonpath из таблицы, существуют

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that each JsonPath from a Cucumber table does not resolve inside a reviewed JSON string, file, or stored response body.
stepPatterns: в json (?:строке|файле) "(.*)" элементы, найденные по jsonpath из таблицы, не существуют

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that JsonPath-selected values match the table of expected values for either a JSON string variable or a stored response body.
stepPatterns: в json строке "(.*)" значения, найденные по jsonpath, равны значениям из таблицы
в ответе "(.*)" значения, найденные по jsonpath, равны значениям из таблицы

supportedCapabilities.summary: Save JsonPath-selected values into scenario variables for either a JSON string variable or a stored response body.
stepPatterns: значения из json строки "(.*)", найденные по jsonpath из таблицы, сохранены в переменные
значения из ответа "(.*)", найденные по jsonpath из таблицы, сохранены в переменные

supportedCapabilities.summary: Validate the body of a stored Response object against a provided JSON schema document.
stepPatterns: значения json "(.*)", соответствует схеме "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that XmlPath-selected values match the table of expected values for a reviewed XML string or file input.
stepPatterns: в xml (?:строке|файле) "(.*)" значения, найденные по xmlpath, равны значениям из таблицы

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that each XmlPath from a Cucumber table resolves inside a reviewed XML string or file input.
stepPatterns: в xml (?:строке|файле) "(.*)" элементы, найденные по xmlpath из таблицы, существуют

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that each XmlPath from a Cucumber table does not resolve inside a reviewed XML string or file input.
stepPatterns: в xml (?:строке|файле) "(.*)" элементы, найденные по xmlpath из таблицы, не существуют

supportedCapabilities.summary: Save XmlPath-selected values into scenario variables for a reviewed XML string or file input.
stepPatterns: значения из xml (?:строки|файла) "(.*)", найденные по xmlpath из таблицы, сохранены в переменные

supportedCapabilities.summary: Validate XML text from a stored response variable against the provided XSD file path.
stepPatterns: значения xml "(.*)", соответствует схеме "(.*)"
notes: The implementation strips a literal soapenv envelope form before validating the remaining XML against the supplied XSD file path.
